rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by using only visible identifiers from the current component scope
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
Delete invalid AGREE clauses that reference AADL properties like Stack_Size instead of repairing them
generic_rules: Generated AGREE expressions must preserve type consistency and use only declared or visible types
Assign statements in implementation scope must reference existing output features or declared variables
Component type annexes should not contain implementation-level guarantees or bindings
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use assume/guarantee/equation/constant syntax within annex agree blocks
Helper functions and variables must be declared before use in the same annex
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture or model dependencies when resolving AGREE diagnostics
Do not attempt to resolve AADL property references by creating new AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics about property associations
Model Analyst Agent's role in extracting AADL structure
